title: Workspace Receipt
description: Execution-plane receipt for one isolated per-run workspace materialization. Emitted as workspace-receipt.json after the workspace is created and exact-SHA verification completes.

contract_version.description: Optional schema version label for emitters.

branch_or_ref.description: Resolved branch name or fallback ref label for the materialized checkout.

dirty.description: Whether the materialized workspace had local modifications immediately after checkout.

candidate_sha.description: Optional candidate commit associated with the run when materialization is derived from a candidate workspace.
